programmes.show_description: Tha BBC Radio nan Gaidheal mar BBC Radio Alba. BBC Radio nan Gaidheal joins BBC Radio Scotland.
Spòrs ionadail, nàiseanta agus bho air feadh an t-saoghail còmhla ri Iain Moireasdan. Local, national and international sport presented by John Morrison.
Taghadh de cheòl dùthchail sean is ùr bho leithid Jo Dee Messina, Eddy Arnold agus Charly Reynolds. Choice of country music, old and new,  from Eddy Arnold and many more.
Ceòl Ceilteach, clàran ùra agus fios mu cò tha cluich càite le Mairead NicIllinnein. Celtic music, new releases and gig guide. Presented by Mairead MacLennan.
Liostaichean-chluiche de phìosan-ciùil a chaidh an clàradh aig fèis Celtic Connections. Music playlist recorded during Celtic Connections as part of the BBC Alba series, Seirm.
Tha BBC Radio nan Gaidheal mar BBC Radio Alba. BBC Radio nan Gaidheal joins BBC Radio Scotland.
Seirbheis còmhla ris an Urr Iain Mac a' Ghobhainn bhon Eaglais Shaor Leantainneach. Gaelic service conducted by the Rev Ian Smith, Free Church (Continuing).
Taghadh de laoidhean is sailm a chaidh a chruinneachadh airson Bliadhna nan Òran. A selection of hymns and psalms selected from the Bliadhna nan Òran / Year of Gaelic Song project.
Taghadh à prògraman na seachdain air a thoirt thugaibh le Anna Nic na Ceardaich. A selection from the week's programmes with Anne Sinclair.
Mìcheal Steele le taghadh de cheòl na pìoba. Mìcheal Steele presents a selection of pipe music.
Ceòl Ceilteach, clàran ùra agus fios mu cò tha cluich càite le Mairead NicIllinnein. Celtic music, new releases and gig guide. Presented by Mairead MacLennan.
Podcast do luchd-ionnsachaidh ceangailte ris an t-sreath SpeakGaelic air BBC ALBA. Weekly podcast for Gaelic learners, accompanying the BBC ALBA series, SpeakGaelic.
Litir Bheag na seachdain sa le Ruairidh MacIlleathain. Litir àireamh 1091. This week's short letter for Gàidhlig learners.
Weekly podcast for Gaelic learners, accompanying the BBC ALBA series, SpeakGaelic.
Litir do Luchd-ionnsachaidh le Ruairidh MacIlleathain. Litir àireamh 1395. Roddy Maclean reads this week's letter for Gàidhlig learners.
Prògram de cheòl Ceilteach ùr nòsach à Alba is Èirinn. Contemporary Celtic music from Scotland and Ireland.
Seirbheis còmhla ris an Urr Iain Mac a' Ghobhainn bhon Eaglais Shaor Leantainneach. Gaelic service conducted by the Rev Ian Smith, Free Church (Continuing).
Prògram à tasglann Fàilte air a' Bhaile. Thadhal Neen NicAoidh air Càrlabhagh ann an 1984. Fàilte air a Bhaile from the archives with Neen MacKay in Carloway in 1984.
Tha BBC Radio nan Gaidheal mar BBC Radio Alba. BBC Radio nan Gaidheal joins BBC Radio Scotland.
Còmhla ris an Urr Donnchadh MacLeòid, Eaglais Shaor Dhòrnaich 2012. Gaelic religious service from 2012 conducted by Rev Duncan MacLeod, Dornoch Free Church.
Taghadh à prògraman na seachdain air a thoirt thugaibh le Anna Nic na Ceardaich. A selection from the week's programmes with Anne Sinclair.
ha BBC Radio nan Gaidheal mar BBC Radio Alba. BBC Radio nan Gaidheal joins BBC Radio Scotland.
